query: I prefer integration tests against real SQLite over mocks, always. record this
in this project we never push directly to main. main is production. branches and PRs only. capture that preference
convention: every public function in vestige-core gets a one-line doc comment
make sure to always run cargo fmt before committing. don't skip it
I don't like multi-line doc comments on private helpers — keep them to one line. house style
we always use newtype IDs (MemoryId, ProjectId), never bare strings. preference, log it
TIL fastembed downloads the model on first call
open question — daemon mode for v0.5?
search for prior decisions on embeddings
the bug was UTF-8 boundary truncation, fixed it
